name: well-architected review: each pillar lists the grounding sources that cover it
command:
bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/well-architected-review.sh" --workload "resilient multi-region platform" --out-dir out --now 2026-06-08T12:00:00Z 2>/dev/null
node -e 'const j=JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync("out/2026-06-08T120000Z.json","utf8"));const sec=j.pillars.find(p=>p.pillar==="security");process.exit(Array.isArray(sec.grounding_sources)&&sec.grounding_sources.length>=1?0:1)' && echo lists-sources 1>&2
